primary_text:
Stone fruit season just landed at the Brookvale hub.

This is what seasonal eating looks like. Fruit that was on the tree days ago, not weeks. Grown on regenerative farms across NSW, picked when it's actually ripe.

No cold storage. No long-haul transport. No wax coatings.

Just fruit that tastes the way it's supposed to.

Available at the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday. Order what you want, when you want. No commitment.
headline: Stone fruit season is here
description: Picked ripe from regenerative farms. Collected fresh at the Brookvale hub.
creative_brief: Overhead shot of stone fruit in a wooden crate. Slightly imperfect, real. Warm natural light. Small chalk-style label with farm name.
